close_reason: Nix-backed prelude implemented and verified with E2E tests
description:
Replace bundled prelude with a Nix-backed prelude cell that can be patched and extended.

See docs/plans/nix-prelude-and-typescript.md for full plan.

**Goal:**
- Fetch upstream buck2-prelude at pinned commit
- Apply turnkey patches (nix/patches/prelude/)
- Add custom rules (nix/buck2/prelude-extensions/)
- Symlink from .turnkey/prelude like other cells

**Why:**
- Enables TypeScript integration
- Allows prelude customization without forking
- Centralizes maintenance in turnkey (not each downstream repo)
title: Nix-backed prelude cell
